title: Looking for analysis on Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Looking for analysis on Evangelion             Quote Post by chaosakita » Wed Dec 29, 2010 1:21 pm I remember that someone here made a single analysis with a formal analysis on Evangelion. It wasn't really a website; all the info was on the front page. Could anyone give me a link to there? I'd appreciate any other links to "formal" criticisms and essays of Evangelion too. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri Dec 31, 2010 6:23 am What do you mean by "formal analysis"? Are you talking about the directorial style or, for example, analysis on Anno's use of montage and edition? I know Ran and Xard has posted some things on the subject, and I've posted a lot as well, but they've been spread across several threads. I don't know of a website/page that's solely dedicated to any formal analysis of NGE, though. The only page of collected NGE essays I know is here , but I think many/most of those are down by now.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Dec 31, 2010 9:01 am Your best bet to find written analysis is on either of the following: http://www.evamonkey.com/em_writings.php http://www.corneredangel.com/amwess/titles/nge.html Use archive.org on any broken links you find: http://www.archive.org/
